summary: This topic details how to map previously defined subjects to specific classes and sections. It includes selecting the class, stream, sections, and defining the subject type (e.g., General, Optional).
steps: Optionally, select 'Stream' and 'Sections' (multiple classes/sections can be selected if subjects are common).
Select the 'Subject' from the dropdown list.
Repeat for all subjects to be added to the class.
business_rules: 'General' subjects are automatically applied to all students in the mapped class.
'Optional' subjects are not automatically applied to all students and require a separate assignment process.
If a subject is already mapped to a class, its original name cannot be changed from the subject definition screen; only its 'Display Name' can be edited within the mapping.
important_notes: You can map a subject to multiple classes or sections simultaneously if they share common subjects.
The 'Display Name' set here will be the name visible to students.
questions: How do I map subjects to specific classes in the ERP system?
What is the purpose of 'Subject Type' in subject class mapping?
Can I map a single subject to multiple classes at once?
How do I change the display name of a subject for a specific class?
What happens if I select 'Optional' as the subject type?
related_topics: Teacher Assignment to Classes and Subjects
